component.name: niriblue Portal
component.summary: Run niriblue ujust recipes from a GUI

description.p: niriblue Portal is a small GTK4/Adwaita front-end for the niriblue ujust recipes. It groups system maintenance, setup and gaming helpers into tabs and runs the selected recipe in a terminal.
Adapted from the Bazzite Portal (ublue-os/yafti-gtk) and rebranded for niriblue.
